things.name: Liido Beach
things.description: Mogadishu's most popular beach - a 10km stretch of Indian Ocean coastline

things.name: Arba Rucun Mosque
things.description: Ancient Mosque of the 40 Pillars - one of the oldest mosques in East Africa

things.name: Hamarweyne Old Town
things.description: Historic Swahili quarter with medieval buildings, bazaars and coastal architecture

things.name: Bakara Market
things.description: The largest market in Somalia - vibrant trade hub for electronics, food and currency

things.name: National Theatre of Somalia
things.description: Restored cultural landmark - Somalia's premier performing arts venue

things.name: Cathedral Ruins
things.description: Ruins of the 1928 Italian colonial Cathedral of the Apostle Peter - now a skeletal frame

things.name: Mogadishu Lighthouse
things.description: Historic colonial lighthouse on the tip of the Mogadishu peninsula

things.name: Villa Somalia
things.description: The presidential palace complex and seat of the Somali government

things.name: Gezira Beach
things.description: Quieter beach north of the city popular with locals for swimming and football

things.name: Lafoole Waterfalls
things.description: Scenic waterfalls 35km west of Mogadishu on the Shabeelle River
